scripts.build:runtime: npm --workspace @omni-ui/core run build && npm --workspace @omni-ui/react run build
scripts.build:all: npm run build && npm run build:registry
scripts.build: npm run build:runtime && npm --workspace apps/demo-todo run build
scripts.typecheck: npm --workspace @omni-ui/core run build && npm run typecheck --workspaces --if-present
scripts.verify: npm run typecheck && npm test && npm run build
scripts.verify:registry: npm --workspace @omni-ui/shadcn run test && npm run registry:build
scripts.verify:examples: npm --prefix examples/react-vite-minimal run typecheck && npm --prefix examples/react-vite-minimal run build
scripts.verify:package-consumer: node -e "fs.rmSync('/tmp/omni-ui-pack',{recursive:true,force:true});fs.rmSync('/tmp/omni-ui-npm-cache',{recursive:true,force:true});fs.mkdirSync('/tmp/omni-ui-pack',{recursive:true});fs.mkdirSync('/tmp/omni-ui-npm-cache',{recursive:true})" && npm_config_cache=/tmp/omni-ui-npm-cache npm run build:runtime && npm_config_cache=/tmp/omni-ui-npm-cache npm pack --workspace @omni-ui/core --pack-destination /tmp/omni-ui-pack && npm_config_cache=/tmp/omni-ui-npm-cache npm pack --workspace @omni-ui/react --pack-destination /tmp/omni-ui-pack && node scripts/verify-package-consumer.mjs /tmp/omni-ui-pack && npm_config_cache=/tmp/omni-ui-npm-cache npm --workspace apps/demo-todo run typecheck:package-consumer && npm_config_cache=/tmp/omni-ui-npm-cache npm --workspace apps/demo-todo run test:package-consumer && npm_config_cache=/tmp/omni-ui-npm-cache npm --workspace apps/demo-todo run build:package-consumer
